'''nachuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagalgia|oesophagalgia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagalgia|oesophagalgia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nachuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchithith|næchithith]] || [[word:næchithij|næchithij]] || [[word:næchithish|næchithish]] || [[word:næchithi|næchithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachuchuthuth|nachuchuthuth]] || [[word:nachuchuthuj|nachuchuthuj]] || [[word:nachuchuthush|nachuchuthush]] || [[word:nachuchuthu|nachuchuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachuthuth|nachuthuth]] || [[word:nachuthuj|nachuthuj]] || [[word:nachuthush|nachuthush]] || [[word:nachuthu|nachuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachufthufth|nachufthufth]] || [[word:nachufthufj|nachufthufj]] || [[word:nachufthufsh|nachufthufsh]] || [[word:nachufthuf|nachufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachuthuthu|nachuthuthu]] || [[word:nachuthuju|nachuthuju]] || [[word:nachuthushu|nachuthushu]] || [[word:nachuthuku|nachuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachuthuth|nachuthuth]] || [[word:nachuthuj|nachuthuj]] || [[word:nachuthush|nachuthush]] || [[word:nachuthu|nachuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachuthuthul|nachuthuthul]] || [[word:nachuthujul|nachuthujul]] || [[word:nachuthushul|nachuthushul]] || [[word:nachuthukul|nachuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachuthuuthuthu|nachuthuuthuthu]] || [[word:nachuthuujuju|nachuthuujuju]] || [[word:nachuthuushushu|nachuthuushushu]] || [[word:nachuthuuku|nachuthuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachuthuthun|nachuthuthun]] || [[word:nachuthujun|nachuthujun]] || [[word:nachuthushun|nachuthushun]] || [[word:nachuthukun|nachuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachuthuthuoro|nachuthuthuoro]] || [[word:nachuthujuoro|nachuthujuoro]] || [[word:nachuthushuoro|nachuthushuoro]] || [[word:nachuthukuoro|nachuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
